title: The Pacifist
content:
Pale Ebenezer thought it wrong to fight,
    But Roaring Bill (who killed him) thought it right.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Hilaire Belloc, titled "The Pacifist", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
